/usr/bin/c++ -DLOCAL_MODE -std=c++11 -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/queryfe_server.dir/queryfe_server.cc.o -o ../../bin/queryfe_server   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/usr/local/lib64:/home/kwadwo/Desktop/WORK/PROGRAMMING_WORLD/PROJECTS_RESEARCH/Templates/DIFS/build/src/master:/home/kwadwo/Desktop/WORK/PROGRAMMING_WORLD/PROJECTS_RESEARCH/Templates/DIFS/build/src/worker:/home/kwadwo/Desktop/WORK/PROGRAMMING_WORLD/PROJECTS_RESEARCH/Templates/DIFS/build/src/metadata-store -lgrpc++_unsecure -lgrpc -lgpr libinf-master.so ../worker/libinf-worker.so ../worker/libworker-util.a ../../protos/internal/libinfaas-protos-internal.a /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.so /usr/local/lib/libabsl_synchronization.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_graphcycles_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_stacktrace.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_symbolize.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_malloc_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_debugging_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_demangle_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_time.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_strings.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_strings_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_base.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_throw_delegate.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_log_severity.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_int128.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_civil_time.so.2206.0.0 /usr/local/lib/libabsl_time_zone.so.2206.0.0 -lgrpc++_unsecure -lgpr ../metadata-store/libredis-md.so -lredox /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libev.so ../../protos/libinfaas-protos.a ../../protos/internal/libinfaas-protos-internal.a -lgrpc++ -lgrpc /usr/local/lib/libprotobuf.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
